meaning_english: Flower. Example: Anthology (a collection of literary works/flowers), Anther (pollen part of flower).
Chief / First / Rule / Ancient. Example: Monarchy (rule by one), Archaeology (study of ancient things).
Guilt / Blame. Example: Culpable (deserving blame), Exculpate (free from blame).
Suffer / Pain / Grieve. Example: Condolence (expression of sympathy/pain with), Dolorous (full of sorrow).
Stray / Mistake. Example: Erratic (not regular/straying), Erroneous (wrong/full of error).
Faith / Trust. Example: Fidelity (faithfulness), Confidence (trust in oneself/others).
Pleasing / Thankful. Example: Gratitude (thankfulness), Gratuitous (given freely/uncalled for).
Flock / Group. Example: Gregarious (sociable/likes groups), Segregate (set apart from the group).
Law / Judge / Swear. Example: Perjury (lying under oath), Jurisdiction (legal power).
Language / Tongue. Example: Bilingual (two languages), Linguist (language expert).
Speak / Talk. Example: Eloquent (fluent speaking), Loquacious (very talkative).
Command / Order. Example: Mandatory (required by law), Mandate (official order).
Form / Shape. Example: Metamorphosis (change of form), Amorphous (without shape).
All / Every. Example: Omniscient (all-knowing), Omnipotent (all-powerful).
Feeling / Suffering / Disease. Example: Empathy (sharing feelings), Pathology (study of disease).
Love / Friend. Example: Bibliophile (book lover), Philosophy (love of wisdom).
Sound. Example: Cacophony (harsh sound), Phonetics (study of sounds).
Please / Calm / Peace. Example: Placid (calm and peaceful), Placate (make less angry).
Fight / Fist. Example: Pugnacious (ready to fight), Impugn (attack as false).
Holy / Sacred. Example: Sanctuary (holy place), Sacrosanct (extremely holy).
Know / Knowledge. Example: Science (systematic knowledge), Conscious (aware/knowing).
Sleep. Example: Insomnia (unable to sleep), Somniloquy (talking in sleep).
Wise / Wisdom. Example: Sophisticated (complex/wise), Philosophy (love of wisdom).
Hold / Keep. Example: Tenacious (holding firmly), Maintain (keep up/hold).
God. Example: Theology (study of religion), Atheist (one who disbelieves in God).
True / Truth. Example: Verity (truth), Verdict (true saying/judgment).
Life / Spirit / Mind. Example: Animate (give life), Equanimity (mental calmness).
Equal / Same. Example: Equivalent (equal value), Equilibrium (balance).
Fold / Tangle / Layer. Example: Complex (many folds/parts), Duplicate (two folds/copy).
Light / Clear. Example: Elucidate (make clear), Lucent (glowing with light).
